summary: Verified Create Tenant Admin screen fix in Super Admin panel. All tests passed: Super Admin login works, tenant dropdown correctly shows 2 tenants (FoodPlaza, Food Panda), form submission creates tenant admin successfully with success toast, and form resets after creation.
seed_data_creation: Created test tenant admin during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Create Tenant Admin feature verified working. superAdminAPI.getTenants() correctly fetches tenants from backend. Dropdown renders FoodPlaza and Food Panda options. Form submission via superAdminAPI.createTenantAdmin() works correctly. Success toast displays and form resets after successful creation.

form_reset.details: Form fields cleared after successful submission

bug_fix_verified.root_cause: superAdminAPI was not imported correctly in CreateTenantAdmin.js
bug_fix_verified.fix_applied: Imported superAdminAPI from @/api/client and used superAdminAPI.getTenants()
bug_fix_verified.verification: Dropdown now shows 2 tenants (FoodPlaza, Food Panda) correctly
